data.title: Chainalysis Identifies Off-Chain Infrastructure as Target in $292 Million Kelp DAO Bridge Exploit
data.description: Chainalysis has reported that the recent $292 million exploit of the Kelp DAO bridge was aimed at off-chain infrastructure, rather than being caused by a smart contract vulnerability. According to NS3.AI, this incident highlights the growing risks associated with off-chain components in blockchain systems. The attack underscores the importance of securing all aspects of blockchain technology, not just the smart contracts, to prevent similar breaches in the future.

data.title: S&P 500 and Nasdaq Reach Record Highs Amid Economic Factors
data.description: The S&P 500 has increased by 17.8% during the first 317 trading days of U.S. President Donald Trump's second term. According to NS3.AI, both the Nasdaq and S&P 500 achieved record highs in early 2026. Factors contributing to this growth include consumer spending, tax relief, higher tax refunds, and earlier Federal Reserve rate cuts. However, rising oil prices and tariff threats have increased costs for households.

data.title: Defiance ETFs Files for AI Resilience ETF Targeting Large-Cap Companies
data.description: Defiance ETFs has submitted a preliminary prospectus to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the Defiance US AI Resilience ETF. According to NS3.AI, this passive fund is designed to include approximately 50 large-cap U.S. companies that are perceived to be less susceptible to disruption from artificial intelligence. The ETF will follow the VettaFi US AI Resilience Index and plans to invest at least 80% of its net assets in qualifying companies under typical market conditions. Once the filing is approved, the fund will be listed on Nasdaq.

data.title: Bitcoin's Lightning Network Capacity Declines Amid Channel Imbalances
data.description: Bitcoin's Lightning Network has experienced a notable decrease in capacity, dropping from over 5,600 BTC in December 2025 to 4,884 BTC currently. According to NS3.AI, this decline is attributed to ongoing channel imbalances faced by routing nodes. Additionally, the number of payment channels has significantly reduced from more than 80,000 in mid-2023 to approximately 45,000 today. Operators continue to struggle with finding an affordable method to coordinate rebalancing efforts.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI's ChatGPT for Clinicians Outperforms Human Physicians on HealthBench
data.description: OpenAI has introduced ChatGPT for Clinicians, a tool designed to assist healthcare professionals. According to NS3.AI, the latest version, GPT-5.4, achieved a score of 59.0 on the HealthBench Professional benchmark, surpassing the 43.7 scored by human physicians. This tool is available at no cost to verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, physician assistants, and pharmacists, aiming to enhance medical practice efficiency and accuracy.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Issues Warning to Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a warning to Iran, stating that the country is running out of time. According to NS3.AI, Trump emphasized that while he has ample time, Iran does not, suggesting a sense of urgency in addressing the ongoing tensions between the two nations.

data.title: Trump's Fed Candidate Passes Initial Test, Pledges Independence
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that U.S. President Donald Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve Chair has successfully navigated his first major hurdle. The candidate has pledged to operate independently, emphasizing his commitment to maintaining the central bank's autonomy in decision-making. This development marks a significant step in the nomination process, as the candidate seeks to reassure stakeholders of his impartiality in handling monetary policy. The promise of independence is crucial as the Federal Reserve plays a pivotal role in shaping economic conditions through interest rate adjustments and other financial measures. The nominee's stance is expected to influence future discussions and decisions within the central bank.

data.title: Senator Lummis Advocates Bitcoin for National Security, Urges Congressional Action on Clarity Act
data.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis has expressed strong support for Bitcoin, highlighting its potential as a tool for U.S. national security. According to NS3.AI, she has urged Congress to expedite the passage of the Clarity Act by April 25 to ensure timely implementation. Admiral Samuel Paparo informed senators that the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command (INDOPACOM) is actively operating a live Bitcoin node and is exploring the protocol's application for enhancing military network security. Lummis warned that failing to meet the deadline could postpone the bill's progress until 2030.

data.title: UAE Mandates AI Integration in Federal Operations by 2028
data.description: The United Arab Emirates has announced a directive requiring 50% of federal government sectors, services, and operations to utilize Agentic AI by 2028. According to NS3.AI, this initiative also mandates AI training for all federal employees. Additionally, ministers and directors-general will be assessed based on the speed of adoption and the quality of implementation.

data.title: Lido Proposes Contribution to Aave's rsETH Relief Effort
data.description: Lido has put forward a proposal to participate in Aave's coordinated rsETH relief initiative by offering a one-time allocation of up to 2,500 stETH. According to NS3.AI, this contribution is contingent upon the establishment of a comprehensive recovery package that addresses the rsETH deficit entirely and aims to mitigate the risk of spillover within the DeFi sector.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Tencent Releases Hy3 Model with Enhanced Performance
data.description: Tencent has unveiled the preview of its Hy3 model, a Mixture-of-Experts AI system featuring 295 billion parameters and 21 billion active parameters. According to NS3.AI, the Hy3 model achieved a score of 74.4% on the SWE-bench Verified test, marking a significant improvement from the 53.0% score of its predecessor, Hy2. This development highlights Tencent's ongoing advancements in AI technology.

data.title: Oil Prices Surge Following Iran's Air Defense Activation Report
data.description: Oil prices experienced a significant increase after a report from Iran indicated that the country's air defense systems had been activated in response to hostile targets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the impact of geopolitical tensions on the energy market. The activation of air defenses suggests heightened security concerns, which often lead to fluctuations in oil prices due to potential disruptions in supply. This development underscores the sensitivity of global oil markets to geopolitical events, particularly in regions with substantial energy production. Traders and analysts are closely monitoring the situation for further developments that could influence market dynamics.

data.title: USDT Transfer: Nearly $300 Million Moved to Ethena from Unknown Wallet
data.description: A significant transfer of nearly 299.9 million USDT, valued at approximately $300 million, was executed from an unidentified wallet to Ethena. According to NS3.AI, this transaction highlights the ongoing movement of substantial funds within the cryptocurrency market. The transfer underscores the dynamic nature of digital asset exchanges and raises questions about the intentions behind such large-scale movements. Observers are keen to understand the potential implications for market liquidity and investor sentiment.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Unveils New AI Model for Enhanced Task Completion
data.description: OpenAI has announced the launch of a new AI model designed to improve task completion with minimal guidance. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this development aims to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of AI in performing tasks autonomously. The new model is expected to streamline processes across various industries by reducing the need for detailed instructions, thereby saving time and resources. OpenAI's initiative reflects the growing trend of AI advancements aimed at increasing productivity and simplifying complex workflows. This move is part of a broader effort to integrate AI more seamlessly into everyday operations, potentially transforming how businesses and individuals approach task management.

data.title: AI TRENDS | OpenAI Launches GPT-5.5 with Enhanced Security Features
data.description: OpenAI has announced the release of GPT-5.5, which includes the most robust security measures to date. According to Jin10, this latest version aims to enhance user safety and data protection, marking a significant advancement in AI technology. The new security features are designed to address previous vulnerabilities and improve overall system integrity.

data.title: AI TRENDS | UK in Talks with Anthropic Over Access to Mythos for Banks and Businesses
data.description: The UK government is reportedly engaged in discussions with Anthropic regarding access to its AI platform, Mythos, for banks and businesses. According to Jin10, these negotiations aim to explore the potential integration of Mythos into financial and corporate sectors, enhancing operational capabilities through advanced AI solutions. The talks reflect the growing interest in leveraging AI technologies to drive efficiency and innovation across various industries.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,300 USDT with a 4.35% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 23, 2026, 17:40 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,300 USDT and is now trading at 2,293.97998 USDT, with a narrowed 4.35% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Meta Platforms to Cut 10% of Workforce to Boost Efficiency
data.description: Meta Platforms has announced plans to reduce its workforce by 10% in an effort to enhance operational efficiency. According to Jin10, the company aims to streamline its operations and improve productivity through these job cuts. This move is part of a broader strategy to optimize resources and focus on key business areas. The decision reflects ongoing adjustments within the tech industry as companies seek to adapt to changing market conditions.

data.title: Tehran Activates Air Defense Systems Amid Unclear Circumstances
data.description: Tehran has activated its air defense systems in certain areas for reasons that remain unclear. According to BlockBeats, this development was reported on April 24 by Iran's Nour News. Additionally, Iran's Mehr News Agency indicated that sounds of the air defense systems engaging enemy targets were heard in parts of Tehran.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 77,000 USDT with a 2.32% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 23, 2026, 17:47 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 77,000 USDT and is now trading at 76,968.460938 USDT, with a narrowed 2.32% decrease in 24 hours.
